programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First to test the Repair Shops technical prowess, Julianna Smith from Milton Keynes. She is hoping Mark Stuckeys mastery of electronics can bring a radio system, handmade by her late father, back to life. Julianna remembers the radiogram filling the house with rock and roll music as a child. Her dear father, Patrick, was a clever chap and this creation, built from scratch, was his pride and joy. With no instruction manual for this unique item, Mark takes a slow and steady approach.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. The first item to arrive is a double challenge for metal man Dominic Chinea and upholstery expert Sonnaz Nooranvary. Father and daughter Joe and Sophie Davies have a piece of their family trades history that they are hoping to revive to be used again. Joes father, Bill, opened a barbers shop in 1949, and both Joe and Sophie have followed in his footsteps. One of the last remaining mementos of the original shop is a 1960s chrome and vinyl barbers chair, which Sophie dreams of having as the centre piece of her own shop. Dom must work out how to repair the hydraulic mechanism, while Sonnaz has to replace and reupholster the ripped and faded vinyl seat covering. Next through the barn doors is Sima Oskoui, with an unusual instrument that will test the skills of Julyan Wallis.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus Ashworth and his team are called out to peoples homes with a mission to sift through a lifetime of possessions and find forgotten treasures that can be sold at auction.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters

She is hoping Mark Stuckeys mastery of electronics can bring a radio system, handmade by her late father, back to life. Julianna remembers the radiogram filling the house with rock and roll music as a child. Her dear father, Patrick, was a clever chap and this creation, built from scratch, was his pride and joy. With no instruction manual for this unique item, Mark takes a slow and steady approach.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. The first item to arrive is a double challenge for metal man Dominic Chinea and upholstery expert Sonnaz Nooranvary. Father and daughter Joe and Sophie Davies have a piece of their family trades history that they are hoping to revive to be used again. Joes father, Bill, opened a barbers shop in 1949, and both Joe and Sophie have followed in his footsteps. One of the last remaining mementos of the original shop is a 1960s chrome and vinyl barbers chair, which Sophie dreams of having as the centre piece of her own shop. Dom must work out how to repair the hydraulic mechanism, while Sonnaz has to replace and reupholster the ripped and faded vinyl seat covering. Next through the barn doors is Sima Oskoui, with an unusual instrument that will test the skills of Julyan Wallis.

programme.title: When Fred Met Rose
programme.desc: Documentary series examining what led Fred and Rose West to become serial killers.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Focuses on the notorious house which the couple shared in Gloucester. Fred and Rose murdered their first three victims - Anna McFall, Charmaine West and then Rena Costello - because they `got in the way. But when they moved into 25 Cromwell Street, the couple began to kill for sexual thrills.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Looks at how a dogged police officer, Hazel Savage, fought to have the Wests patio excavated when she became suspicious about the whereabouts of their daughter. The film also includes insights from both Fred and Rose Wests former solicitors.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When 27-year-old David Wahl disappears without a trace from a state park in Oregon, he leaves behind a distraught family and a host of unanswered questions. Months later and 100 miles north, Wahls body washes ashore. The death is ruled an accident, until a shocking admission by his girlfriend leads to criminal charges.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: The disappearance of seven-year-old Amanda Brown from her Florida home sparks a massive search effort by dozens of law enforcement agencies and hundreds of concerned citizens. While the search for the missing girl continues, investigators look into the history of the last man to see her alive, and make a chilling discovery.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: The community of Dover, Delaware, is shocked when parts of a human body turn up across the city. Authorities determine it is one victim, but forensics experts struggle to identify the person while a hunt for the killer is conducted.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: In 1992, gang activity escalates in Chicago; with local law enforcement unable to curb the growing drug trade, a multi-agency task force headed by Assistant U.S. Attorney Ron Safer focuses on one of the citys most vicious street gangs.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: For many teenagers, their first jobs are at fast-food restaurants. Parents feel that these are safe environments for their children. That image is shattered when seven employees of three different fast-food restaurants in the Nashville, Tennessee area are murdered over a two-month period in 1997. Months of investigation reveal a Texas parolee as the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A community is horrified when seven trick-or-treaters in Pasadena, California are sprayed with gunfire on Halloween night in 1993, leaving three young boys dead. Investigators rely on forensic clues, eyewitness accounts, and street informants to find the killers, three gang members bent on avenging a friends death.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: An evening of pick-up basketball in Houston turns tragic when prosecutor Gil Epstein is murdered in a community center parking lot. Investigators depend on anonymous tips and hazy eyewitness accounts to track down a killer. District Attorney Chuck Rosenthal leads a prosecution team whose chances for a conviction are put in jeopardy by a single holdout juror.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When a mother and her infant daughter disappear from rural Huntsville, Texas, suspicion quickly falls on the womans husband. Lacking evidence, authorities cannot make an arrest. With the case growing cold, a teenager hundreds of miles away confesses to the murder of Margaret and Kori Rae Owings.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: On Memorial Day Weekend 1996, a womans body is discovered in a storm drain in Marietta, Ohio. Police eventually identify the woman as college student Sheree Petry and begin to focus the investigation on one suspect, Dennis Rydbom, who had been spurned by the victim.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When firefighters in suburban Indianapolis are called to a house fire, what they find inside shocks the entire community, a respected minister and his wife have been murdered with an ax. An exhaustive investigation leads authorities to a teenage church member and his accomplice.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A string of rapes spanning two decades goes unsolved in Jacksonville, Florida, until Detective Diana Clarke finds a link among the crimes and discovers that a serial rapist is terrorizing the community. After a suspect is finally arrested, Detective Clarke teams up with Prosecutor Libby Senterfitt to track down the rapists victims and convince them to testify.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A robbery and double homicide at a grocery store in Raleigh, North Carolina shocks the community. With little evidence left behind, and no eyewitnesses, the investigation stalls. Then a tip to authorities implicates a store employee in another robbery and leads Prosecutor Evelyn Hill to believe that that employee, and his brother, committed the murders.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A church shootout in northern Virginia leads authorities to an ex-FBI agents home. When an unwitting accomplice comes forward the mans complex plot to get revenge on his estranged wife becomes clear.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: A double murder of young women startles residents in a California community.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case, what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.

programme.title: The Perfect Victim
programme.desc: Three women spend more than 30 years in prison for killing their abusive husbands. They fight the system that incarcerated them when a new law is passed and their cases are reheard.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When a mother and her infant daughter disappear from rural Huntsville, Texas, suspicion quickly falls on the womans husband. Lacking evidence, authorities cannot make an arrest. With the case growing cold, a teenager hundreds of miles away confesses to the murder of Margaret and Kori Rae Owings.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: On Memorial Day Weekend 1996, a womans body is discovered in a storm drain in Marietta, Ohio. Police eventually identify the woman as college student Sheree Petry and begin to focus the investigation on one suspect, Dennis Rydbom, who had been spurned by the victim.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When firefighters in suburban Indianapolis are called to a house fire, what they find inside shocks the entire community, a respected minister and his wife have been murdered with an ax. An exhaustive investigation leads authorities to a teenage church member and his accomplice.

programme.title: New Life: Born to Swim
programme.desc: Exploring how wildlife become expert swimmers to find food and escape danger.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: Explore the life of the highly influential director credited as the inventor of the Italian Western genre. His films include Once Upon a Time In America.

programme.title: Pink Floyd: Delicate Sound of Thunder

Against the backdrop of the Civil War, they search for a fortune in gold buried in a graveyard. Each knows only a portion of the golds exact location, so they must work together.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto is forced to come out of hiding when a loved one is brutally murdered. Heading to LA to track down the culprit, he crosses paths with Brian OConnor, the FBI agent whose undercover infiltration of Torettos gang led to the motorised miscreants exile across the border. The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Following the death of his friend, Bobby decides to leave the army but he is soon asked to come back into action in order to help prevent the assassination of the President.

programme.title: Shooter

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: Tom and Jerry: Cowboy Up!
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are in the Wild West where they help save a ranch from the hands of a greedy villain. The rivals team up to help a cowgirl and her brother save their homestead from a greedy land-grabber.

programme.title: The Ogglies
programme.desc: Young Max meets the Ogglies, a family of green, garbage-eating creatures who live at the dump in the town of Smelliville. When a contractor plans to build a wellness temple at the dump, Max and his pal must hatch a plan to save the Ogglies home.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Disgraced FBI agents Marcus and Kevin go to bizarre lengths to catch a devious millionaire. They disguise themselves as dumb white socialites Brittany and Tiffany Wilson, the heiresses to a hotel fortune who are under threat. Gross-out comedic farce from the makers of `Scary Movie.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: When his fathers job results in a family move to the countryside, young German boy Bruno misses his old friends. Roaming the grounds of the large country house he now calls home, he discovers the huge fenced facility that his dad Ralf, a Nazi officer, now manages. Approaching it, Bruno meets Shmuel, a fellow youngster on the other side of the barbed wire, wearing what appears to be a pair of pyjamas.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Goring.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Its the hottest day of the year and when Italian-American Sal refuses to make changes to his pizza parlour in the predominantly black community, tension and tempers mount.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Two adopted brothers and rival dancers are thrust together when they are both invited to audition for the World Breaking Championships.

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: Raised outside of her M?ori culture, tween Sam sets out on a mission with two other misfits to reconnect with her tupuna: Taranaki Maunga. Together, the three go on an unconventional journey and discover the power of friendship.

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually cant afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonkas chocolate factory.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: Blueback
programme.desc: After Dora suffers a stroke, her adult daughter, Abby returns to her coastal Australian hometown to help with her recovery. To try to coax Dora out of her nonverbal state, Abby tells her stories from her childhood, recalling Doras activism.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: Paul Blart takes his teenage daughter with him to Las Vegas for a security-guard expo. While there, he stumbles upon a heist and must single-handedly apprehend the crooks.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: When a familys pet cat is called, they manage to resurrect the animal by placing it in an Indian burial ground which, it is believed, can revive the dead, although in doing so they create a monster.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: When reporter Daniel Malloys curiosity leads him to interview the mysterious Louis De Pointe Du Lac, the last thing he expects is to find himself talking to a vampire. Louis tells him his life story, about how he was turned, and the vampire Lestat who made him what he is.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: When reporter Daniel Malloys curiosity leads him to interview the mysterious Louis De Pointe Du Lac, the last thing he expects is to find himself talking to a vampire. Louis tells him his life story, about how he was turned, and the vampire Lestat who made him what he is.

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: A group of explorers make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb is is an absolute pro at stealing ideas from peoples minds during the dream state but now he is being challenged to perform the reverse: plant an idea in the mind of a target. The ultimate in corporate espionage, and much is at stake if Dom cant pull it off.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: Frodo is a hobbit who elects to become the bearer of the Ring of Power, which, if reclaimed by its maker and master Lord Sauron, will see him gain full and terrible power over all of Middle Earth. Frodo sets out with The Fellowship of the Ring, led by Gandalf and Aragorn, and six other companions to Saurons stronghold, Mordor, the only place where the ring can be destroyed.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Hobbits Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. A mercurial creature who has been warped by the Ring, Gollum promises to guide the Hobbits to the Black Gates of Mordor if they will release him. Middle-earth Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Sarumans deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The final part of the fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens epic tale. Despite Gollum, hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring, while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Saurons evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith. Then, to buy Frodo and Sam time, they must march to the very gates of Mordor to distract Saurons gaze from the Ring bearer.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The final part of the fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens epic tale. programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A violent and uncompromising police officer hunts for a psychopath who holds the city of San Francisco to ransom. Although the officers unorthodox methods do not endear him to his superiors, the mayor reluctantly agrees that Harry Callahan seems to be the right cop for the job.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-mans-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: Every Breath You Take
programme.desc: A psychiatrists life gets turned upside down when a patient takes her own life and he introduces her brother to his own family.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British familys idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wifes death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. The line between duty and off-duty begins to blur, however, when the daughter of one of the cops is kidnapped by the gun-toting heavies.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: Murtaugh is only days away from retirement when he and Riggs, along with officer Lorna Cole, are assigned to track down a crooked ex-cop who is supplying huge consignments of guns to gangs.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In 2009, Somali pirates storm a U.S. containership and hold Capt. Richard Phillips and his crew captive.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Unsung Heroes Of Waterloo
programme.desc: For over two hundred years, the story of Waterloo has revolved around British heroism and the strategic importance of the late-arriving Prussians. What is often forgotten is the crucial contribution of the Dutch-Belgian troops.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts with the very best in British archaeology 2016, filmed by the archaeologists themselves, straight from the trenches, so you can see each exciting discovery as it happens. This episode focuses on finds from Northern Britain.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Finds include: revelations from `Britains Pompeii, the 3,000-year-old perfectly preserved village in Cambridgeshire, including how Bronze Age ancestors designed their homes, and their kitchens packed with food and equipment, and the theatre where Shakespeare premiered Romeo and Juliet and Henry V.

programme.title: Britains X Files
programme.desc: Deep beneath the streets of London sit thousands of previously top-secret government files which disclose the details of investigations into the paranormal. Tim Tate reveals just how far authorities were willing to go to venture into the unknown.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Lost Liners

programme.title: Mengele Unveiled

programme.sub-title: The Story of Zed The Hero of Africa

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Flamingo Festival

She loves to watch the flamingoes practising their dance, and secretly copies their moves. When Isobel hurts herself, everybody is worried that the Flamingo Festival will have to be cancelled. That is, until a surprising understudy steps in to take Isobels place.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Whale Trip

Hercule points out all manner of sights and sounds as they ride on Thelma the whale, but the boisterous puffins dont always listen to Hercule, and frequently interrupt the poor walrus. The puffins soon learn how important it is to listen to your elders when out on a trip.

programme.desc: When Tommy and Tallulah agree to babysit the spring chicks while Madame Au Lait tends to Mother Chicks hurt wing, they dont realise that how much of a handful the chicks will be. programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are organising McCogginss pile of interesting junk when a vitally important spring goes missing. They cant chime the time without it! The twins chase the spring all over town as it bounces around causing chaos, eventually ending up attaching Pufferty to his kennel. Every time he tries to go somewhere, the spring pulls him back.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: McCoggins tells the twins not to stray far, but they forget to warn Pufferty when they try to teach him how to play hide and seek. There are not many places in Tickety Town big enough to hide a huge dog train, so Pufferty heads far off into the hills. Where can he be? The race is on to find him by Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah find harvesting very slow when they volunteer to pick Lopsiloos vegetables. Surely there must be some way to speed it up? However, when they hit upon the idea of using Pufferty to pull all the vegetables up at once, they are shocked to find that Puffertys carriages unhook and run amok through Tickety Town.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to deliver a precious package to Madame Au Lait and decide that a ride with Pufferty is safest way to transport it. However, when Hopparoo challenges the lovable dog train to a race, the package bounces out of the carriage and embarks upon a crazy journey round Tickety Town, with Tommy and Tallulah in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tickety Town is covered in fallen leaves, so Tommy and Tallulah are using McCogginss new prototype street sweeper to clear them. However, in their eagerness to speed things up, they go against his instructions and press the turbo button. Suddenly, the sweeper goes haywire, rampaging through town and sucking up anything in its path, including Madame Au Laits clock key and very nearly Hopparoo too.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The whole town gathers to take part in McCoggins treasure hunt. Whoever finds the most cogs will be the winner. Knowing that McCoggins hides the cogs in the same places every year, Tommy and Tallulah are cruising to victory, until they realise that a quick win will spoil everyones day, but when they borrow McCoggins special clockwork rollerskates to put the cogs back, the skates zoom out of control.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins decide that everyone must get active and turn Tickety town into a boot camp. With Tommy banging his drum and Tallulah blowing on her trumpet, soon everyone is lifting, running, puffing and panting. They are all so exhausted that they fall fast asleep, but with Chime Time imminent, they must find a way to wake up Puffertys wheels.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Cooking Contest
programme.desc: Horace the hare and Bao Bao the panda cant agree who is the better chef, so it is decided that they will hold a cooking contest and their friends will decide who is the winner. Unfortunately, Horace and Bao Bao get so caught up in the competition that everything starts to go wrong.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Alfie and Charlies Canoe
programme.desc: Alfie and Charlie the chipmunks have always dreamed of exploring the river. They are excited when Randolph the raccoon agrees to take them on a canoeing trip. However, in their haste to set off, they forget vital equipment.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Confuse-Us the Carp
programme.desc: Its a topsy-turvy day as Bao Bao the panda and Horace the hare set off on their morning walk - nothing is as it should be and the two friends cant understand why. Confuse-Us the wise old carp tells them that the ping and the pong are out of balance. The friends set off to try and put things right.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Bao Baos Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Bao Bao the panda and Cassandra the crane are best friends. When Cassandra announces that autumn is almost here and she will soon leave, Bao Bao is upset at her imminent departure and prepares himself for life without her. Bao Bao learns that Cassandra is only leaving for the winter months, and he should make the most of her company while he can.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Savannah Craze
programme.desc: Doris the duck is fed up of always playing the same old games with her friends. She wants to invent a new and fun game they can all play but her other friends are reluctant to join in. She heads off on her own, and soon the other animals are intrigued by the strange bouncy boingy noises that can be heard across the savannah.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a Long Night in the Jungle
programme.desc: Giggles and Tickles are so excited about their birthday the next day that they vow to stay up all night long so that they dont miss a single moment of it. The other animals on the savannah are tired and soon go to bed. Can the mischievous monkeys find ways to keep themselves awake all night and still enjoy their birthday?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a the Record-Breaking Puffins
programme.desc: Gunnar the gull is encouraging the puffins to break as many records as they can. Their noise is distracting Hercule Moustache, who is busy trying to build a beach sculpture. The puffins do their best not to disturb the walrus.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Ronald and His Boulders
programme.desc: Ronald the rhinos favourite pastime is bashing boulders - but one day he realises there are no more boulders left to bash on the savannah. Ronald sets out to find something else to bash - with almost catastrophic consequences.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the House of Leaves
programme.desc: Nelson the elephant wants to build the biggest and best house of leaves ever. His nephew Nigel is eager to help out, but Nelson is worried that the leaf house might be too fragile for his exuberant young nephew. When the house of leaves comes crashing down, Nelson wastes no time in telling Nigel off.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Gertie the Goat
programme.desc: Gertie the goat has agreed to take Bao Bao the panda on a climbing expedition up the So Hi Mountains. The other animals advise Gertie against the trip, since pandas are not renowned for their climbing skills. Will Gertie and Bao Bao prove the others wrong, or will they need some help from their friends?

programme.desc: Its the one weve all been waiting for. Emotions run high as the cast of Friends take one last trip to Central Perk to reminisce and relive moments from the iconic sitcom.

programme.title: Rob and Romesh Vs...
programme.desc: Rob and Romeshs journey into the restaurant business continues to opening night. Having to do everything from find a location to shopping for their ingredients, this adventure culminates with the boys opening Londons very first Hip Hop Curry House.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: After they find themselves ordered by McCann to sell all the weed they have grown, the lads decide to throw a music festival in Jims field.

programme.title: Ricky Gervais Fame
programme.desc: Ricky Gervaiss stand-up show tackles the weird world of fame, blurring the line between the acceptable and the outrageous, with a balancing act that had audiences across the country in stitches in what was the fastest-selling live comedy tour in UK history.

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Counts down some of the most incredible, spectacular and hilarious real life crashes in the world. Video cameras capture massive pile ups, road rage and misguided overtaking manoeuvres.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A closer look at New Zealand cops as they deal with the challenges of monitoring the nations busiest motorway.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A closer look at New Zealand cops as they deal with the challenges of monitoring the nations busiest motorway.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A closer look at New Zealand cops as they deal with the challenges of monitoring the nations busiest motorway.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Face a life-and-death struggle with vet Bec, who gives a koala joey mouth-to-mouth, and see vet Meaghan test her microsurgical skills on a baby fruit bats teeny toes. Catch a bath-averse python and tag along as rescuer Jo nabs a trapped barn owl.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: In the southern reaches of Africas great Kalahari basin, everything is made tough. Ancient rivers harbour water deep underground, and these hidden lifelines forge a fragile link to survival. This is the Kgalagadi Transfrontier Park.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Six graduates from jungle school are finally set to be freed into the wild from the pre-release islands after an arduous journey by road and river into the heart of Borneo.

programme.title: Dogs With Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: Dogs are using their remarkable scenting skills for lifesaving conservation and pro-active environmental policing. In Canada, a team of canine detectives is sniffing out the destructive invasive zebra mussel.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Iceland is the worlds largest volcanic island. This lone and rugged island is a volcanic hotbed where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day from deep inside the Earths blazing core.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: The Invisible River- Under Water Between The Black Forest And The Vosges
Leopard Dynasty: The Rise of Rana
Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Protective: In the Australian wilderness, the protection of young takes many forms. Sometimes its tender and other times its sharp claws.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Talented: In the natural world, being talented can bring all sorts of advantages and Australia has no shortage of exceptional talent.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: A two-year-old Tasmanian Devil named Carlos looks for food and fights for dominance.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: March is the breeding month of the Devils, and the pregnancy lasts about eighteen days. The litter is usually about twenty but there are only four nipples, to which the first pups will arrive, and the rest will die.

programme.title: Natures Dress Code: Who Wears What And Why
Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David begins his journey inside the magnificent Palm House, a unique global rainforest in London.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the secret life of plants at Kew, examining everything from a huge underground specimen to a snappy carnivorous variety.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David Attenborough concludes his absorbing journey around Londons Kew Gardens, as he discovers how some plants have evolved to shed their dependency on water enabling them to survive in the driest environments.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: A notorious brotherhood of cheetahs rule the southern plains of the Serengeti, until a raging bushfire turns their world upside down.

programme.title: Attack and Defend
programme.desc: Indisputable apex predators and unassuming-but-lethal prey wage war in natures daily battle royal for the right to live another day. From carnivorous cheetahs, polar bears and sharks to exploding blast ants, vomiting fulmar birds and slime-excreting hagfish, those who attack and those who defend have developed specialized skills in their ongoing struggle to survive. Witness the masters of predator-prey conflict as they showcase their intimidating and extraordinary tactics.

programme.title: Attack and Defend
programme.desc: Indisputable apex predators and unassuming-but-lethal prey wage war in natures daily battle royal for the right to live another day. From carnivorous cheetahs, polar bears and sharks to exploding blast ants, vomiting fulmar birds and slime-excreting hagfish, those who attack and those who defend have developed specialized skills in their ongoing struggle to survive. Witness the masters of predator-prey conflict as they showcase their intimidating and extraordinary tactics.

programme.title: Attack and Defend
programme.desc: Predators evolved to hunt insects have a plentiful and easy to consume food source.

programme.title: Attack and Defend
programme.desc: Cold-blooded predators are brutal and cunning killers.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: A notorious brotherhood of cheetahs rule the southern plains of the Serengeti, until a raging bushfire turns their world upside down.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Capturing the overlooked life of the elephant and the irreplaceable role he plays in the survival of his species.

programme.title: Natures Dress Code: Who Wears What And Why
Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Living on the southwestern tip of Africa is an unusual colony of African penguins. Most African penguins prefer to breed on off-shore islands in the region, but human interference on their island homes has caused many birds to look elsewhere.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: The wildlife of South Africas lowveld are forced to adapt to the dry season. Everyone from the gargantuan hippos to the nimble antelope must go on a quest to seek water.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A unique insight into the everyday lives of animals and how they compete, cooperate, love, and cry, just as humans do.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Join a line of hermit crabs as they prepare for a very orderly house swap on a beach in Belize, and meet a chimpanzee in Senegal who has found a genet cat to keep as a pet.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of big cats, shining a light on the worlds of leopards, lions, and cheetahs.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of big cats, shining a light on the worlds of leopards, lions, and cheetahs.

programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: Deep in the South Caribbean Sea, explore the protected waters of Bonaire National Marine Park, home to thriving reefs, endangered sea turtles, sprawling mangroves, and a plethora of marine life.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band -- to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: Into the Wild Colombia
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee looks at how single offspring depend on one critical life companion - their mother, who will go to extraordinary lengths to care for them.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Exploring how some siblings quickly forge lifelong bonds, while others compete.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough brings the wonders of the Natural History Museums astonishing collection to life. During a magical, after-hours journey, he brings you closer than ever before to the extraordinary creatures that once roamed our planet.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Right beneath our feet is a secret world of disguise and espionage, social networking and courtship, rape and pillage, parenthood and relationships. Sir David Attenborough investigates how macroscopic residents outwit their enemies to survive.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Capturing the overlooked life of the elephant and the irreplaceable role he plays in the survival of his species.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: With the latest film-making technology, Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: Shark With Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve explores the radical variety of sharks in the Atlantic Ocean and marks the start of a global journey in the so-called shark capital of the world, the Bahamas.

programme.title: Shark With Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Take a look behind the scenes as naturalist and shark-lover Steve Backshall gets up close and personal with these amazing creatures.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: There are clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. There is a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound and a honey badgers dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Capturing the overlooked life of the elephant and the irreplaceable role he plays in the survival of his species.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Documentary mapping the aftermath of the catastrophic bushfires in Australia. How does nature recover and how do the wildlife in the affected area live?

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas and catch an epic giraffe battle.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn go down a copper mine, just a few hundred yards from their cottage, which was once the major source of Morwhellam Quays wealth. Historian Ruth Goodman learns the art of lace-making, visiting the town of Honiton which became world famous for its lace. The boys also go tin mining in Cornwall, an industry which survived until the end of the 20th century.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Philip Serrell, top trader Melissa Downhill and upholsterer Micaela Sharp head to Hay-On-Wye where they have just one day to find some bargains that they can turn into some flipping profit. programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus plans to bring in some ducks, but things arent as simple as they seem as he heads out onto the lake to create a new home for them. Heading to Devon, he discovers the perfect breed for the smallholding.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and team visit Hull to transform the garden of Macmillan nurse Maggie Simkiss, who cares for patients at the end of their lives, treating their emotional wellbeing as well as their medical needs. Even if someone has been diagnosed with just hours to live, Maggie says there is a great deal she can do to make their final hours worthwhile and happy. Outside work she is equally devoted to charities and also looks after her grandchildren, so her garden has been neglected.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh presents the garden makeover show, transforming unloved spaces for some very special people. Alan and the team are in the sleepy town of Wiveliscombe to surprise a pair of real-life Golden Girls - Roberta and Enid, who have been friends for 71 years. Robbie is 91 and Enid 86. Robbie is almost completely blind and has mobility problems, so Enid has become her care, even though she herself has just been through a battle with breast cancer. They have settled in Somerset.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh presents the garden makeover show, transforming neglected spaces for some very special people. Alan and the team are in Dorset creating a garden for a young family coping with terminal illness. Student Rachel is 27 and met 29-year-old Dorset farm worker Andrew while out clubbing six years ago, and they became an item instantly. The couple were planning their future when Andrew was diagnosed with bowel cancer.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: In a special wild episode of Love Your Garden, Alan Titchmarsh and his team are in Bedfordshire, transforming a neglected outside space at Keech Hospice in Luton into a state of the art wildlife garden. Alan meets the staff and residents at Keech, a place where many people with life-limiting illnesses go to spend their final days. He realises how much a garden, and in particular a place for nature, could make a difference to people approaching the end.

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Castle Durrow sets the stage, as four unique antiques have their moment under the hammer. A Fender guitar signed by the Rolling Stones piques the interest of dealer Ian. And a 400 year-old Tibetan dagger made from a meteorite prompts a bidding war.

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: A 19th-century Japanese silver punchbowl, a boule table and a John Constable painting go under the hammer. And will a 1930s Philco radio make a sound profit?

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Without doubt, a huge influence over modern British cuisine are the flavours of the Mediterranean. programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: aul and Bob return to Scotland to fish for salmon once more, this time on the mighty River Tweed. They start their search for a so-called bar of silver surrounded by banks of lush tall trees at the Bemersyde Estate, a place where it is easy to forget the outside world and do nothing but concentrate on fishing.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul takes Bob on a trip down memory lane and back to the River Lea in Hertfordshire, where Paul used to come as a teenager with his mates. programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve

programme.title: QI

programme.title: Mock the Week

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Lovejoy

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: When Lady Jane persuades Lovejoy to act as driver for an old friend who has to attend her brothers burial at sea, he finds himself standing in for the padre, surrounded by the drunken ex-shipmates of the esteemed skipper.

programme.title: Lovejoy

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Browns divine inspiration is called upon when Kembleford comes under threat of an alien invasion.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When serious criminal Mark Johnson was killed in a fatal fire at Londons Union club in 1996, a wall of silence among witnesses and associates plagued the investigation. With fresh information suggesting that the blaze was a targeted arson attack, UCOS reopen the case, but does Johnsons legacy of fear live on, and will anyone risk talking to the team?

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team reinvestigate the 1983 abduction of 18-year-old debutante Barbara Linden-Warner. The daughter of a wealthy British arms manufacturer, Barbara was the apple of her fathers eye. However, did she pay the ultimate price for her life of privilege?

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.sub-title: The Curious Tale of Mr. Spearfish
programme.desc: Lenny Spearfish has had an impressive run of good luck since signing a deal with the devil: hes become an instant millionaire, survived a shooting, and seen an assassin collapse in front of his very eyes. When Jonathan and Maddy meet Spearfish and his deeply religious wife Alice through mutual friends, they are intrigued by his story, and suspect he may be getting help from somewhere other than Hell.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: Sailing Close To The Wind: Part 1

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: Sailing Close To The Wind: Part 2
programme.desc: As the motives stack up against suspects Gregg and Harry, Kits killer sends another violent warning and Judith, Becks and Suzie find themselves in a race against time to solve the case.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When Mike, Kristin and Chalmers must determine who wanted a veterinary nurse dead, the answer is seemingly tied to simmering tensions between twin sisters.

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: When a babysitter is murdered and a dangerous patient and former Whitechapel resident escapes from a psychiatric unit, the area is hit by a series of terrifying events. Meanwhile, Chandlers quest to bring in a suspect alive jeopardises his relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: With no sign of a thaw in relations between Lady Agnes and Maud, Hallam finds his diplomatic skills put to the test at home as well as at work. programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Sir Hallam finds himself at the centre of a national crisis when his friend, the Duke of Kent, asks for help. However, as the king finally abdicates, Hallam makes a discovery that will change his life forever.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick is one of Englands top animal doctors and the subject of 2010 documentary programme `The Bionic Vet, which showcased some of the work done at his Surrey clinic. On `The Supervet Fitzpatrick and his staff treat some of the countrys hardest-to-cure pets with cutting-edge treatments and surgery. The programme tells the emotional stories of the pets, their owners and the passionate team that push the boundaries of veterinary medicine to save the animals from life-threatening conditions.

programme.desc: Dharam Singh is a honest farmer in rural India and lives with his sister Bela. One day both siblings witness a murder and drag the murderer down to the police station. However, what they do not realise is that the murderer is the brother of the influential Arjun Singh and that their decision to turn him in will change everything.

programme.title: War

programme.title: Dil To Pagal Hai
programme.desc: Rahul is the director of a successful music and dance group and considers Nisha his best friend. Secretly, she is madly in love with him. Following an injury, new dancer Pooja joins the company and Rahul finds himself falling for her, but she is engaged to Ajay who is the son of the family who raised Pooja following her parents death. As preparations for the new show progress, will Rahul decide on a happy ending?
